title: Moss Panorama
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf5277bf43aec10109ca88d1263ed9fca1ed46d1.png)

## Moss Panorama

**Moss Panorama** is a custom main menu panorama resource pack for **Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.x**.

This resource pack replaces the default Minecraft main menu background with a carefully composed panorama, giving the game a distinct visual identity from the moment it launches. The panorama is designed to feel calm, cohesive, and immersive while remaining fully consistent with Minecraft’s vanilla visual style.

The scene is built using **two unique in-game locations from our server**, selected and combined to form a single, seamless panorama. Special attention was given to composition, lighting, and color balance to avoid harsh contrast, overexposure, and visible artifacts.

## Features

* Complete replacement of the default Minecraft main menu panorama
* Clean, seamless images without stitching or visual artifacts
* Vanilla-friendly presentation with a distinct custom identity

## Compatibility

* **Minecraft: Java Edition 1.21.x**
* Menu-only resource pack (does not affect gameplay or in-world visuals)

## Purpose

Moss Panorama is intended for players who want to:

* Customize the visual mood of their game before entering a world
* Add a recognizable identity to a server or modpack
* Enhance atmosphere while preserving a vanilla-inspired aesthetic
